files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons for June with 4 distinct lessons: Theology/Testimony (Sabbath), Work/Business (brief), Literature (John Jaques hymns), and Social Service (Moral Leadership). Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content. The file also contains extensive advertising material at the end which should be included with Lesson IV as it appears to be part of the magazine layout.
